value_chain_position: Full-service contract research organization (CRO); designs and executes clinical trials for biotech/pharma clients; a pure-service picks-and-shovels layer for drug development.
relative_comps: Medpace is a specialized mid-size CRO focused heavily on metabolic, cardiovascular, and oncology trials for emerging biotech sponsors — a segment where ICON and IQVIA are less competitive due to size. Its 20% 3-year CAGR and 28% FCF margin are best-in-class among public CROs, reflecting a fully-integrated model and high therapeutic specialization. Against ICLR and IQV, Medpace commands a premium multiple due to faster growth and niche positioning. The risk is biotech funding cyclicality — when VC/IPO funding tightens, small-biotech sponsor backlogs compress.
